topic: Be Verb (Am, Is, Are, Was, Were)
challengeTask: Use at least 10 sentences with Be Verb (Am, Is, Are, Was, Were) in a real conversation or diary entry today.
hindiTask: आज Be Verb (Am, Is, Are, Was, Were) का उपयोग करते हुए कम से कम 10 वाक्य किसी असली बातचीत या डायरी में लिखें।
successCriteria: Be Verb (Am, Is, Are, Was, Were) rule applied correctly in every sentence
bonusChallenge: Record yourself speaking 5 of these sentences and check your pronunciation.
